description: Author a FAILING integration test (RunOutcomeWiringTests, TDD red against current code) that drives the REAL CLI run on a fixture that proceeds a wave unreviewed and asserts the four observable facts: delivery is suppressed (WhollyGreenButUndelivered / not delivered — mergeOnSuccess OFF), the CLI exits the distinct non-zero code (numeric 5), the run flags 'ran with N unreviewed waves', and the harness NEVER wrote a review marker (state/guardrails-review.json absent)
